archetypes.description: Veers lead with Piett provides TM loop via trap stacks and assists

requiredAbilities.reason: The Emperor's Trap provides TM gain and trap stacks - core mechanic for the TM train

optionalAbilities.reason: Ruthless Assault provides bonus damage on out-of-turn attacks
Suborbital Strike provides AoE dispel and Daze

warnings: Veers leadership works without a zeta - his unique is the optional one

archetypes.description: 3v3 variant requiring Dark Trooper zeta for the kill loop

requiredAbilities.reason: Terminate enables the 3v3 kill loop - Dark Trooper must one-shot targets

warnings.message: Missing Dark Trooper zeta commonly breaks the 3v3 kill loop
Requires high relic Dark Trooper to one-shot enemies

archetypes.description: CLS lead with Chewie/Han/Threepio for TM train and protection

requiredAbilities.reason: Rebel Maneuvers provides TM manipulation and survivability
Learn Control provides Guard and bonus turn mechanics
Loyal Friend guard is ESSENTIAL - protects CLS and enables counter attacks

optionalAbilities.reason: Chewie Raging Wookiee provides damage boost
Shoots First provides opening damage and TM manipulation

warnings.message: Chewie's Loyal Friend zeta is critical for the team's survivability

archetypes.description: Dash lead with Chewie/Han for prepared stacking

requiredAbilities.reason: Leadership provides Scoundrel synergy and TM manipulation

optionalAbilities.reason: Loyal Friend guard protects weakest ally

archetypes.description: Dash with GAC omicron - massive power spike in GAC

requiredAbilities.reason: GAC omicron is essential - provides massive TM and damage boost

archetypes.description: Padme lead with GR for protection up stacking and survivability

requiredAbilities.reason: Leadership grants Protection Up on debuff resist - core defensive mechanic
Unique provides bonus turn and TM manipulation

optionalAbilities.reason: Ahsoka unique provides healing and damage
JKA unique provides bonus turn on kill

archetypes.description: GAS with 501st clones for damage immunity cycling

requiredAbilities.reason: Leadership provides clone synergy and damage immunity
Unique provides the damage immunity toggle mechanic
Fives sacrifice zeta is ESSENTIAL - provides massive stat boost when he dies

optionalAbilities.reason: Unyielding Advance provides bonus attacks
ARC Trooper unique improves damage output

warnings.message: Fives zeta is critical - without it the team loses most of its power

archetypes.description: Darth Revan lead with Fear mechanics and Malak tank

requiredAbilities.reason: Leadership provides Fear and Sith Empire synergy
Unique enables bonus turn and Fear spreading
Malak Gnawing Terror zeta is ESSENTIAL for drain and survivability

optionalAbilities.reason: Badstila unique improves control

warnings.message: Both Malak zetas are critical - without them the team is significantly weaker

archetypes.description: JKR lead with Marked mechanic and Jolee revives
